name: golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev
title: golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev
summary: implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr (lib)
description:
implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr (lib)
This package implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr
package (see also https://github.com/go-logr/logr), in terms of Go's standard
log package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev because implements the logr interface from the golang-github-go-logr-logr (lib).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-go-logr-stdr-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
